Student.title: Student
Student.description: A student registered in the DANIEL 120 platform.

id.description: The login ID for the student.

password.description: The login password for the student.

schoolName.description: Name of the school the student attends.

class.description: The academic stream or class (e.g., Class 10, NEET).

ActivityLog.title: ActivityLog
ActivityLog.description: Log of student activities (logins, material access).

metadata.description: Additional info like title of material.

/students/{studentId}/activity/{activity.description: Real-time activity logs for a student.
